economic_claim_note: Per-share claims use fully diluted shares from valuation.inputs.
implied_growth_contract: Constant 7-year owner-cash growth with a 16x terminal owner-cash multiple; diagnostic, not forecast.
falsifiers: replacement cost used for assets that cannot earn their cost of capital
pricing_conclusion: Entry prices were computed mechanically from the routed power-zone profile (Capital cycle and normalized industry economics). They are decision inputs, not a decision; the owner must review the scenarios before acting.

trigger.policy: A complete economic-value analysis is required when any trigger fires; otherwise it is recommended.

economic_claim.description: One diluted share of Axcelis Technologies, including mid-cycle ion implant operations, systems backlog conversion option, net cash claims, and cycle reserve.
economic_claim.enterprise_to_equity_reconciliation: Debt-free balance sheet; operating value and backlog option are additive; cycle reserve is a liability component; services cash flow embedded in core engine.

economic_value_bridge.accounting_reference: FY2025 10-K and Q1 2026 10-Q; mid-cycle owner cash normalized across FY2023-FY2025.

component_groups.label: Mid-cycle ion implant systems and services owner-cash engine
component_groups.economic_claim: Mid-cycle ion implant systems and services owner-cash engine
component_groups.adjustments: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K and Q1 2026 10-Q before decision use.

component_groups.label: Systems backlog and deferred revenue conversion option
component_groups.economic_claim: Systems backlog and deferred revenue conversion option
component_groups.adjustments: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K and Q1 2026 10-Q before decision use.

component_groups.label: Net cash and debt-free balance-sheet claims on common equity
component_groups.economic_claim: Net cash and debt-free balance-sheet claims on common equity
component_groups.adjustments: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K and Q1 2026 10-Q before decision use.

component_groups.label: WFE downcycle, China exposure, and backlog-decline reserve
component_groups.economic_claim: WFE downcycle, China exposure, and backlog-decline reserve
component_groups.adjustments: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K and Q1 2026 10-Q before decision use.

valuation_proof.economic_claim: Mid-cycle ion implant systems and services owner-cash engine
valuation_proof.evidence: Primary bridge from ACLS/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260226_rpt20251231_acc0001104659_26_020461.htm: FY2025 revenue $839.0M, OCF $118.3M, FCF $107.0M, cash $145.5M, systems backlog $457.0M; contract backfill 2026-07-21.
valuation_proof.adjustment: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K and Q1 2026 10-Q before decision use.
valuation_proof.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or cycle path is materially worse than low case.
